name: Fruited Pork Roast, Scandinavian Style
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Boneless rolled pork loin roast
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 3 hours
1. Remove string from roast.
2. Using a sharp knife, cut a pocket in the pork by making a deep slit in the loin, going to 1/2 inch of both ends and 1 inch of the other side.
3. Meanwhile, combine prunes, beer, and ginger in a saucepan. Heat to boiling. Remove from heat and let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Mix apple with lemon juice to prevent darkening. Drain prunes, reserving liquid; pat dry with paper towels. Combine drained prunes and apple.
5. Pack fruit into the pocket in the pork. Tie roast with string at 1-inch intervals.
6. Place meat on a rack in a roasting pan.
7. Roast meat at 350 degrees F for 2-2.5 hours, allowing 40 to 45 minutes per pound. Baste occasionally with the liquid drained from prunes.
8. Transfer meat to a platter. Skim fat from cooking liquid.
9. Deglaze the roasting pan with a little water, then add to the cooking liquid. Add salt and enough additional water to measure two cups. Make a paste of flour and water, combine with cooking liquid and cook, stirring constantly until thickened.
10. Serve in a sauceboat with sliced roast. Makes 8 servings.
